name: Manager
description: Workday role allowing managers to create requisitions, view team data, and participate in hiring processes.

name: HR Administrator
description: Workday role with access to core HR data, job requisitions, and offer creation.

name: Recruiter
description: Avature role for managing candidates, posting jobs, and coordinating interviews.

name: Hiring Manager
description: Avature role allowing managers to review candidates and provide interview feedback.

name: Access Administrator
description: ServiceNow role for managing access requests and provisioning workflows.

name: Identity Administrator
description: Azure AD role for managing user identities, groups, and provisioning.
